{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201711341186BF3A3F2119019189"}"},"total":5},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7510822175625511705","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看[害羞]，符合我的胃口[飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748753726,"group_id":"7502602264930946072","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7s5lL95WdwlNPFFDHfe3LQ=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/eefccc1b04024064ae8b6fea1f963b85~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533375&x-signature=Z%2BDmZoP9ZK%2FH4mrWeopYBe%2FCPMs%3D","user_id":"653574027353367","user_name":"落了秋葵葵"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"653574027353367","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7502602264930946072","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主＋穿越架空＋暴君＋权谋＋抽风搞笑＋各种吐槽＋神经病般的剧情走向】
　　萧懋是自觉就算是穿越自己肯定也会有所作为的普信宅男！穿越后就被现实啪啪打脸，然后被异世界君王教他重新做人的故事。
　　萧懋：我可是从未来穿越过来，看过各种历史书、兵法和谋略书籍的谋士！（虽然只在游戏里使用过，但我游戏玩得特别厉害！）
　　栗寒：所以呢？
　　萧懋：拥有我，我可以帮你统一这个世界！
　　栗寒：可寡人是个暴君。
　　萧懋：卧槽！
　　（作者排雷：暴君肯定不洁！！需要双洁的亲亲勿看么么哒＾3＾！）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o2dd292ba5636944bfd1f791b1377d8a5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"哈皮的猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7502602264930946072","book_name":"暴君！倾倒在我的才华之下吧！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7502602378755981848","read_count":"27","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"661565"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"318","tags":"双男主,穿越,异世穿越,古代,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o2dd292ba5636944bfd1f791b1377d8a5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181894&x-signature=XLJswe32C0W5yKYwZ%2BAx0P%2BCdMQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"345720635807971","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"50"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201711341186BF3A3F2119019189"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读59分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3527,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":607},"use
